1 + (62/3 - (4613840*Log[2])/350283 + (24570945*Log[3])/1868176)*et^2 + (9177/64 + (271636085*Log[2])/1401132 - (466847955*Log[3])/7472704)*et^4 + (76615/128 - (4553279605*Log[2])/2802264 + (14144674005*Log[3])/119563264 + (914306640625*Log[5])/1076069376)*et^6 + (1903055/1024 + (135819536755*Log[2])/22418112 + (3964202553465*Log[3])/956506112 - (39315185546875*Log[5])/8608555008)*et^8  + (9732723/2048 - (61237079991493*Log[2])/2017630080 - (3772118655280899*Log[3])/153040977920 + (8770943603515625*Log[5])/826421280768 + (24891464996631149*Log[7])/1377368801280)*et^10
